reviews.text: En Tao & Maria did a fabulous job photographing our mountaintop wedding in gorgeous Crested Butte! They have a unique way of showcasing the stunning landscapes while still capturing the intimate moments of the wedding itself. Their fun & laid back personalities made us all feel comfortable throughout the day. Their prompt & professional manner both before and after the big day meant no photography stress for us, and our photos were returned to us SO quickly! We definitely recommend Magnified Joy Photography!

In August 2019, our community of Family & Friends came together in the mountains of Crested Butte, Colorado, for our oldest Daughter, and now Son in Law's, incredible WedFest Event!
There with us, were En Tao and Maria Ko, of Magnified Joy....!

From the moment I spoke with En Tao on the phone, (me in Austin, him in Denver at the time), there was an instant connection, and, I knew there was no need to look further for a Wedding Photographer.

It is hard to put into words the absolute JOY En Tao and Maria brought to our WedFest!
From the beginning "Welcome Dinner" to the "Day after Brunch", these two amazing Photographers were with us, and managed to capture every memorable moment beautifully!
Even now, as I look back on Magnified Joy's work, I am right back in the moment of one of the very BEST weeks of my life!
That's what En Tao and Maria's work does.....recreate the magic of the day....the weekend....the Wedding!

If you want someone who will help create your "dream come true" event, honor and work with your budget, work perfectly with every person/vendor involved in your special occasion, bring beauty, creativity, both sentiment and fun, and LOVE to every photograph....En Tao and Maria from Magnified Joy are the professional Photographers you want with you and your Family....your Guests....your Circle of Friends.

I will never forget our time with En Tao and Maria of Magnified Joy....
They brought Joy to our WedFest....
They brought Joy to our lives....

Magnified Joy’s aptly named service does just that- magnify the love and joy you feel with your loved ones. En Tao and Maria themselves are kind and loving people whose relaxed nature allows your joy to overflow in front of the camera as they cheer you on from behind the lens. Although, they were such masters of making us feel comfortable, we forgot the cameras were there at all. From a business standpoint, they are timely and responsive in communication and perfectly balance sharing their expertise with incorporating your asks as a client. You’re not just hiring a photographer, you’re engaging in a new friendship.

This review is much overdue. En Tao and Maria went above and beyond for our wedding last fall.  They took the initiative to get to know us beforehand (they took us out for tacos and walked us through a little practice shoot) so we were totally comfortable with them on our wedding day.  We hired these two because we loved how natural their photos look - not staged - and they managed to accomplish this with us despite our awkward tendencies. My only regret is not hiring them for more time on our wedding day/weekend!

The experience is in the name. En Tao & Maria were an absolute JOY to work with!

We had a wonderful adventure session with them at Point Reyes, and then they really captured the aura of the day for our wedding in Crested Butte.
